subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its purpose understood. Thou didst inquire about motion and rest [3.5s]... ...Thou hast asked concerning the motion and stillness of all things according to the Will of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوب مرقوم ملاحظه گردید و مقصد مفهوم شد سوال از حرکت و سکون
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
